verse_text: saying, 'Lord, my servant is lying at home paralyzed, dreadfully tormented.'

links.context: This is the second sign (v. 54) reported in John's Gospel (see note at 2:1-11). Having revealed He can see into the hearts of people from a distance (1:45-48), the Lord now demonstrates He can heal from a distance, showing His divine power knows no earthly limits. While there are certain similarities between this sign and the miracle recorded in [[MAT.8:5]]-13, there are many crucial differences; these are clearly two different encounters.
